name: planforge
description: A lightweight Superpowers-inspired planning and execution workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Lean planning and execution workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: PlanForge turns ideas, fixes, and existing plans into practical agent-readable implementation plans, then executes them inline or with subagents using a lighter Superpowers-inspired workflow.
defaultPrompt: Brainstorm this idea into a PlanForge plan.
Create a brainstorm-fix plan for this bug.
